title: Annual Tech Summit 2026
description: Join industry experts and innovators for keynote sessions, workshops, and networking opportunities. Topics include AI, cloud computing, and emerging technologies.

title: Campus Sports Day
description: Compete in cricket, volleyball, badminton, and athletics. All students welcome. Register your team by March 15.

title: Cultural Fest Auditions
description: Open auditions for dance, music, drama, and art performances. Be part of our biggest celebration of the year!

title: Startup Pitch Competition
description: Showcase your startup ideas and compete for funding. Pitch in front of investors and mentors. Win up to ₹1,00,000!

title: Alumni Networking Night
description: Connect with successful KCC alumni. Great opportunity for career guidance and mentorship. Light refreshments provided.

title: Workshop: Web Development Basics
description: Learn HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals. Perfect for beginners. Bring your laptop. Limited seats - register now!
